_doc: Allow-list of intentional CLI ↔ MCP parity gaps. Closes part 2 of pulp #1997. Adding to this list = explicit decision to defer or skip MCP exposure. Removing an entry = the corresponding MCP tool now exists. Naming: cli_only keys are hyphenated CLI command names (no `pulp_` prefix); mcp_only keys are full MCP tool names (with `pulp_` prefix). Validate with: python3 tools/scripts/check_cli_mcp_parity.py --mode=report
_convention: When promoting an entry off the cli_only list, add the matching pulp_<command> tool to tools/mcp/pulp_mcp.cpp's tools_list_json() AND a corresponding handler dispatch in handle_request(); the parity check will then auto-detect the new coverage. When promoting a tool off the mcp_only list, add the matching CLI command to tools/cli/pulp_cli.cpp's command tables or experimental/pulp-rs/src/main.rs's Command enum.

cli_only.add: Package add — agents shell out to `pulp add` directly; no MCP gain
cli_only.audio: Parent command — actual MCP surface is pulp_audio_model_* and pulp_audio_excerpt_find sub-tools
cli_only.audit: License audit — agents shell out; output not RPC-shaped
cli_only.cache: Trivial via Bash on ~/.pulp/cache; no MCP gain
cli_only.ci-host: Interactive host onboarding (brew/tart/launchd); delegates to setup-ci-host.sh, no RPC-shaped output
cli_only.ci-local: Long-running orchestrator; agents drive `shipyard pr` instead
cli_only.clean: Trivial via Bash (rm -rf build/); no MCP gain
cli_only.coverage: Wraps tools/scripts/local_diff_cover.sh; agents call the script directly
cli_only.design: AI design tool — interactive surface, not RPC-shaped
cli_only.dev: Watch loop; not useful from a one-shot RPC
cli_only.docs: Parent command — actual MCP surface is pulp_docs_check and pulp_docs_search sub-tools
cli_only.doctor: Diagnostic CLI; output is human-shaped, not JSON-shaped (see #1997 follow-up)
cli_only.export-tokens: Variant of import-design; rarely used; one-shot Bash works
cli_only.fmt: Wraps clang-format -i against .clang-format; agents shell out directly
cli_only.harness: Catalog-driven verifier; agents drive via Bash
cli_only.identity: Identity-lock review surface; agents shell out so lockfile diffs remain explicit
cli_only.import: Framework-import command; needs an installed add-on importer tool — MCP exposure deferred until the importer ships via `pulp tool install` (packaging task)
cli_only.import-design: Heavy multi-step import; agents call the binary directly today (see #1997 follow-up)
cli_only.inspect: Top-level inspect command — superseded by 5 pulp_inspect_* tools
cli_only.loop: Watch loop; same reasoning as dev
cli_only.macos: Per-PR macOS-runner retargeting; agents call via Bash
cli_only.motion: Top-level motion CLI — actual MCP surface is the pulp_motion_* inspector-wrapper tools
cli_only.overflow: macOS overflow routing; agents call via Bash
cli_only.pr: Routes to `shipyard pr`; agents call shipyard directly
cli_only.project: Per-project SDK pin; agents call via Bash
cli_only.projects: Registry plumbing; agents call via Bash
cli_only.scan: Plugin scanner; large output, agents shell out
cli_only.ship: Multi-step interactive flow; agents call `shipyard pr` instead
cli_only.tool: Tool registry plumbing; agents call via Bash
cli_only.tweaks: Local pulp-tweaks.json drift diagnostic; agents shell out directly (mirrors the inspector drift drawer)
cli_only.version: Trivial via Bash (cat CMakeLists.txt | grep VERSION)

mcp_only.pulp_audio_excerpt_find: Sub-tool of `pulp audio` — audio service surface, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_audio_model_activate: Sub-tool of `pulp audio` — audio service surface, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_audio_model_list: Sub-tool of `pulp audio` — audio service surface, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_audio_model_status: Sub-tool of `pulp audio` — audio service surface, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_audio_probe_json: One-shot wrapper around `pulp run --audio-probe-json`; no separate top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_audio_read_bundle: Sub-tool of `pulp audio` — audio service surface, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_audio_render: Sub-tool of `pulp audio` — offline render RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_audio_scope: Sub-tool of `pulp audio` — scope JSON/PNG surface, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_compat: Introspection tool — reports pulp-mcp / MCP protocol / project SDK versions + per-tool min_sdk floors so clients can pre-filter (#2070). No CLI peer because `pulp doctor --versions` already covers the human surface.
mcp_only.pulp_content_install: Sub-tool of `pulp content` — explicit content-pack install RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_content_list: Sub-tool of `pulp content` — content-pack inventory RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_content_preview: Sub-tool of `pulp content` — content-pack compatibility/reload preview RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_content_remove: Sub-tool of `pulp content` — explicit content-pack removal RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_content_rescan: Sub-tool of `pulp content` — metadata rescan RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_content_reveal: Sub-tool of `pulp content` — installed-path lookup RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_content_update: Sub-tool of `pulp content` — explicit local content-pack update RPC with approval, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_content_validate: Sub-tool of `pulp content` — metadata validation RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_docs_search: Sub-tool of `pulp docs` — wraps `pulp docs search`
mcp_only.pulp_get_view_tree: Headless screenshot harness; wraps pulp-screenshot binary
mcp_only.pulp_inspect_audio: Sub-tool of `pulp inspect` — Audio.getConfig over inspector socket
mcp_only.pulp_inspect_dom: Sub-tool of `pulp inspect` — DOM.getDocument over inspector socket
mcp_only.pulp_inspect_evaluate: Sub-tool of `pulp inspect` — Runtime.evaluate over inspector socket
mcp_only.pulp_inspect_params: Sub-tool of `pulp inspect` — State.getParameters over inspector socket
mcp_only.pulp_inspect_set_param: Sub-tool of `pulp inspect` — State.setParameter over inspector socket (gesture-wrapped numeric param write)
mcp_only.pulp_inspect_performance: Sub-tool of `pulp inspect` — Performance.getMetrics over inspector socket
mcp_only.pulp_inspect_screenshot: Sub-tool of `pulp inspect` — Capture.screenshot over inspector socket
mcp_only.pulp_kit_apply: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — explicit reviewed project mutation RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_init: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — local kit scaffold RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_inspect: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — metadata inspection RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_pack: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — archive packaging RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_plan: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — reviewable project-plan RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_publish_check: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — dry-run registry-readiness RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_remove: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — explicit owned-file removal RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_search: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — local manifest discovery RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_validate: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — metadata validation RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_kit_verify: Sub-tool of `pulp kit` — post-plan validation-profile RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_motion_disable_cost: Sub-tool of `pulp motion` — inspector Motion.disableCost RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_motion_enable_cost: Sub-tool of `pulp motion` — inspector Motion.enableCost RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_motion_list_traces: Sub-tool of `pulp motion` — inspector Motion.listTraces RPC, no top-level CLI peer

mcp_only.pulp_motion_play: Sub-tool of `pulp motion` — inspector Motion.play RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_motion_scrub_to: Sub-tool of `pulp motion` — inspector Motion.scrubTo RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_motion_snapshot: Sub-tool of `pulp motion` — inspector Motion.snapshot RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_motion_start_trace: Sub-tool of `pulp motion` — inspector Motion.startTrace RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_motion_stop_trace: Sub-tool of `pulp motion` — inspector Motion.stopTrace RPC, no top-level CLI peer
mcp_only.pulp_screenshot: Headless render via pulp-screenshot binary; not a top-level CLI command
mcp_only.pulp_simulate_click: Headless screenshot harness; wraps pulp-screenshot binary
